6.note: Round 1. Parent #223 checked off but OPEN by design (no sub-issues). Squash 2327f569. 3 docs-content tests green; archived to #223 (commit 0ceeefe).

4b.note: to-code addendum (NOT in frozen slice ledger), added at user direction to close the slice-4 append-name persistence gap (#251, refs #221 #239). Squash 311ecfe. Full suite 427 passed, 1 pre-existing macOS worker failure. NB: an iCloud ' 2' dup ref (.git/index 2, refs/heads/release/runner-execution 2) appeared mid-round and broke a fetch; removed per known quirk, repo healthy.

4c.note: to-code addendum (NOT in frozen slice ledger). Bug fix found in manual testing of #253: get_pipeline 500 on pre-feature DBs (#254). Registered alias_map.position + source_function_map.append_name in _REGISTRY_SCHEMA_MIGRATIONS. Squash 48fb32e. 153 tests green; verified live (reloaded server, dev DB migrated, endpoint 200). Folds into #253.

4d.note: to-code addendum (NOT in frozen slice ledger). Gap found in manual testing of #253: builtin palette cards had no detail drawer (#256). Added PaletteBuiltinDrawer reusing __UI__.Drawer. Squash 0c15a51. 79 frontend tests green. Folds into #253.

scalar-params.note: to-code addendum (NOT in frozen slice ledger). Critical correctness gap #258: executor never read source_scalar_map, so functions with scalar params couldn't run (TypeError -> 0/0). Now resolves+broadcasts scalar values, captures defaults at registration, surfaces failed-run errors, locks single runner. Squash 8dd0b32. 437 py + 80 frontend green; verified live (is_above_threshold threshold=5 -> 29/11 counts). Root cause: missing acceptance criterion (PRD assumed source_scalar_map->executor wiring; never existed even on beta). Folds into #253.

nan-export.note: to-code addendum. Bug #262: transformed-report export 500'd on NaN (nan not JSON compliant) for null-containing data, so appended columns never showed. get_staging_rows scrubs NaN/NaT/inf->null via _json_safe. Squash 7fc49b6. 440 py green; verified live (customers export 200 with all 5 appended cols). Root cause: slice-5 export tests used null-free synthetic data.

outcfg.note: to-code addendum, PARTIAL for #264 (backend). Append auto-label = fn_name_column (uppercase_email); new function_output_config makes output_mode/append_name per-function (was per-set); runner/attach/patch wired w/ legacy fallback. Squash 78dd785. 443 py green; live-verified (customers appends now round_to_monthly_spend/uppercase_email/etc). #264 STAYS OPEN for the per-function modal UI.

setiter.note: to-code addendum #266: function-set steps were routed to one executor by dominant type, dropping validations inside transform/mixed sets (missing from results report). run_pipeline now processes every function a step contains by its own type (_step_has). Squash 7bd560b. 445 py green.

8.note: blocked-on-design (#225). Not picked up by to-code.

anno.note: #268: worker evaluated user annotations -> pd.Series[bool] crashed module exec (Series not subscriptable), failing every fn in the file. Compile with future-annotations flag. Squash 02f522251719c536c9109a4542710521abff0db6-short. 446 py green; live: within_range now runs (remaining failure is a string-column binding mismatch, not a bug). Exposed by #266.

noise.note: #270: strip macOS [worker] setrlimit-failed noise from worker error messages so the real failure surfaces (_clean_worker_stderr). Squash 805b9a3. 448 py green.
